rules.name: Element with Must-Support removed in R6
rules.description: An element marked as Must-Support in R4 has been removed in R6. This requires special attention during migration, as systems supporting this element need to be adapted.
rules.template: Element {{Name}} exists in R4 MS, but removed in R6.

rules.name: Change in cardinality for Must-Support element
rules.description: The cardinality of a Must-Support element has changed. This may mean that required fields become optional or vice versa.
rules.template: For element {{Name}}, the cardinality changed in R6 and it had an MS in R4: {{Comments}}

rules.name: Element type changed in R6
rules.description: The data type of an element has changed between R4 and R6. This may require data transformation during migration.
rules.template: The element type switched in R6 at element {{Name}} from {{L Type}} to {{R Type}}

rules.name: Element removed in R6
rules.description: An element from R4 no longer exists in R6. Data in this element may need to be migrated to another element or discarded.
rules.template: The element {{Name}} exists in R4 but was removed in R6.

rules.name: Element added as required in R6
rules.description: A new required field has been added in R6. Values for this element must be provided during migration.
rules.template: The element {{Name}} was added as required in R6.

rules.name: Element added in R6
rules.description: A new optional element has been added in R6. This is usually unproblematic and offers new possibilities for data modeling.
rules.template: The element {{Name}} was added in R6.

rules.name: Change in cardinality
rules.description: The cardinality of an element has changed. Check whether this affects your implementation.
rules.template: For element {{Name}}, the cardinality changed in R6: {{Comments}}

rules.name: R5 Preadoption Extensions
rules.description: This profile uses R5 Preadoption Extensions that are not fully supported in R4-only contexts. Additional configuration may be needed for compatibility.
rules.template: This profile uses R5 Preadoption Extensions

rules.name: Resource Removed in R6
rules.description: A resource type that exists in R4 has been completely removed in R6. This requires alternative approaches in migration.
rules.template: The resource was removed in R6.

rules.name: R4 vs R6 - Comparison Error
rules.description: The Java Validator encountered an error when comparing this StructureDefinition. This is typically due new R6 types (like CodeableReference) not being supported during validation.
rules.template: The StructureDefinition {{name}} had an error while comparing: {{message}}
